impact: At D0.90 the plugin over-produces 100Hz THD (21.8% vs pedal's 11.5%) and under-produces 400Hz THD (16.9% vs pedal's 37.4%). The zener knee/softness does not track drive level correctly and needs drive-dependence or a per-drive parameter. v2Params() is still a placeholder equal to v1LateParams() -- V2's Cj/knee were never fit independently. Shares its shape/root-cause class with gap B (V1E drive-dependent band saturation).
title: V2 zener drive tracking: THD imbalance across frequency
